raw_output_payload.reasoning: Need command to delete all hidden files under /workspace. Hidden files start with dot. Recursively? Probably all hidden files. Use find. Command: find /workspace -type f -name ".*" -delete. Also directories? If want delete hidden files and directories? Use -exec rm -rf. But safer: find . -type f -name ".*" -delete. Provide command.
